content: Static-site SEO/OG: define canonical site metadata once (url, name, description, owner) then per-route metadata (title, description, canonical, image, dates). OG tags must be in raw HTML head, not JS-injected. og:image ~1200x627px. Descriptions <=200 chars to avoid truncation. OG doesn't directly affect Google ranking but controls link-preview rendering on LinkedIn/Slack/X -- high value for a recruiter-shared portfolio link. Also relevant in 2026: correct structured metadata is a trust signal for AI summarizers/crawlers.
